hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC, KYB, and regulatory checks into structured workflows that help VASPs review directors and control persons with clear audit trails and risk-based decisions.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Director and shareholder reviews remain disconnected
problem_description: VASPs struggle with fragmented data and manual processes when reviewing directors and control persons during onboarding. This slows due diligence, weakens audit trails and complicates defensible compliance decisions across multiple providers and data sources.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates KYB and KYC provider outputs into one risk-based onboarding workflow, linking directors, shareholders, reviews and evidence to accelerate due diligence and improve audit readiness for VASPs.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to director approval
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates KYC and KYB provider results to guide risk-based director and shareholder reviews, facilitating compliance decisions with complete audit evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented onboarding. One review control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured review workflows, decision logs, evidence preservation and audit-ready documentation tailored for VASP director oversight.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY gives VASPs a controlled compliance layer connecting provider outputs with audit evidence and deployment governance for thorough director and shareholder due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help review VASP director and shareholder checks
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how director and shareholder reviews become audit-ready
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how provider orchestration supports director due diligence workflows
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY preserves evidence for director onboarding cases
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP director review?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps VASPs structure director and shareholder reviews by connecting KYC, KYB and screening outputs into one compliance workflow with audit-ready evidence and decision records.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support director onboarding workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates identity, corporate and control person checks, applies risk-based routing, manages reviewer assignments and records decisions during onboarding of directors and shareholders.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, provider results, decision logs and supporting evidence to support onboarding reviews are traceable and audit ready.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates multiple KYC and KYB providers and applies rules to connect their outputs into structured review workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or KYB providers; it connects their outputs into one operational layer for compliance and audit purposes.
final_title: Structure director and shareholder reviews with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects KYC and KYB checks into risk-based workflows with audit-ready evidence for VASP onboarding compliance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
